rationale: Stacks entered its Year 5–8 epoch (~Jan 2025) where block rewards halved from 1,000 to 500 STX/block; at ~144 Bitcoin-anchored blocks/day this yields ~26.28M STX/year against a circulating supply of ~1.475B STX, giving ~1.78% annualized inflation. The rate stays flat for the next 24 months until the next halving (~Jan 2029), so no meaningful change is expected within the 24-month window.
